entry.title: F.08 tcode Foreign Currency Balances Return Zero in F.08 After S/4HANA 1809 → SP04/2023 Upgrade
entry.content:
Hello After upgrading the S/4HANA system from release 1809 to SP04/2023, during the execution of F.08 Foreign Currency Valuation, local currency (TRY) balances are calculated correctly, however foreign currency (FC / YBP) balances are returned as zero, even though the “Foreign Currency Amount” option is selected on the F.08 selection screen. In the previous 1809 system, the same configuration, accounts, and documents produced correct foreign currency valuation results. In the upgraded system, no error

message is displayed, but foreign currency valuation lines are not generated at all

“It is working normally in the system before the transition.”

entry.title: 3451944 - FI PL : KSeF number enablement for MIRO postings in ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a Question regarding SAP-Note 3451944.

Has anyone implemented the note? If yes, could you tell me if its working in your system.

I have followed the instructions in the note but Ksef-number gets cleared or disappears, whenever i enter it in MIRO.

Thank you

entry.title: ZZ field upload in the journal entries app is not populated the backend
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA On-Premise implementation and I am facing an issue with a custom ZZ field in the Journal Entry upload process.

Context

  • I have a custom ZZ field created in the CI_COBL extension.

  • According to SAP notes, this field needs to be published so it can be used in the Upload Journal Entries Fiori app.

  • I exposed and published the field as a Key User Custom Field extension in the Coding Block using transaction SCFD_EUI.

  • The S_ATO_SETUP was already configured.

Configuration Done

The field has been published and activated in the following apps and objects:

  • Journal Entry Item

  • FINS Substitution / Validation – Journal Entry Item

  • Manage Journal Entries

  • Post General Journal Entries

  • Target structure for field mapping

  • All OData and SOAP services related to FINS_CODING_BLOCK

Observed Behavior

  • The field is correctly published.

  • When I open the Upload Journal Entries app and download the Excel template, the custom field (ZZUEN) is present in the template.

  • However, when I fill the ZZUEN field in the template and upload it:

    • The journal entry is successfully posted.

    • The ZZUEN value is not populated in the corresponding ZZ field in ACDOCA.

Debugging and Analysis

  • I activated BADI_FINS_ACDOC_POSTING_EVENTS and implemented debugging logic to intercept the posting process.

  • The ZZ field exists in ACDOCA and is visible in the item structures passed to the BAdI methods.

  • However, the original frontend field (ZZ_1* field from the Excel / UI) is not available in the interface structures, so I cannot perform the mapping.

  • It seems the value is lost before reaching the posting BAdI.

Question

The process appears straightforward: expose the field via Custom Fields, activate it in the UI and services, and use it in the Upload Journal Entries app. While the field is technically available and visible in the template, it is not mapped to the backend ZZ field during posting.

  • Is there a specific BAdI or enhancement spot responsible for mapping custom fields from the XLSX layout to the backend coding block?

  • Is there any additional configuration required to ensure the custom field value is transferred from the Upload Journal Entries app to ACDOCA?

Any hints or guidance to resolve this issue would be highly appreciated.

Kind regards,
Francisco

entry.title: Purchase Functionality is not working (Purchase and offsetting accounts in GRN)
entry.content:
Dear SAPians,

We are facing an issue with the purchase functionality in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

We have maintained the transaction keys EIN and EKG in Automatic Account Determination for GRN postings (purchase account and offsetting account). However, despite maintaining these entries, the system is not generating the corresponding accounting entries during GRN.

Could you please advise if we are missing any configuration, or if there are any additional settings that need to be checked in S/4HANA Cloud?

#SAP Invoice and Goods Receipt Reconciliation #Sourcing and Procurement - Purchase Contract Management #SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement #FIN (Finance) #SAP Fiori Cloud 

Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: 3451944 - FI PL : KSeF number enablement for MIRO postings in ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a Question regarding SAP-Note 3451944.

The field is displayed in Miro, but is there a way to display it in MIR4 as well?

Regards,

Kamil

entry.title: Posting Period Set Wrongly
entry.content:
Hi all, 

My team has wrongly set the posting date of period 2025-12 to be from 01.12.25 to 31.01.26, instead of 01.12.25 to 31.12.25 and create new periods for 2026. Transactions in Jan 2026 have been made.

How is this going to affect closing for 2025.
Is there a way to correct the posting period and the transactions that are already made?

Thank you!

entry.title: New program: Auth Object Requirements
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am working on FSD where a new program is been planned to be developed. There is question on Auth Object section in security requirements. 

As functional consultant, how to provide Auth objects details.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: MIRO posting for Demurrage condition (ZA90) posting to inventory instead of Demurrage G/L
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need guidance on MIRO posting behavior for a demurrage condition.

In MIRO, the demurrage condition ZA90 shows an amount of PKR 1,945,979 at invoice level. However, when we open the Follow-On Accounting Document, the posting to the Demurrage G/L 521030135 is only PKR 1.11, while the remaining amount is absorbed into inventory and material price difference accounts.

Observations:

Condition type: ZA90 – Demurrages

G/L mapped to ZA90: 521030135 (Demurrages)

MIRO shows full demurrage amount

FI document shows:

Very small amount (1.11) on Demurrage G/L

Majority of the value posted to:

RM – Excipient

Material Price Difference

GIT / Inventory-related accounts

Issue / Question:
Why is SAP capitalizing the demurrage amount into inventory instead of expensing it fully to the Demurrage G/L, even though the G/L is correctly mapped?



Please review the attached screenshots.

entry.title: Ayuda en uso de Tx ABZU
entry.content: Por necesidades contables necesitan modificar el valor de las amortizaciones de un activo a cierta fecha. Si valen 600,000 ahora necesitan valga 100,000. Me dice mi compañero de activos que para eso sirve esta tx ABZU. Tenemos un manual de uso pero es muy basico, alguien tendra algun documento o guia mas detallada?

entry.title: How to find the app Manage Tax Items for Legal Reporting (ID: F3172) ?
entry.content:
The app Manage Tax Items for Legal Reporting (ID: F3172) is not visible in the Fiori Launchpad search.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Event based Revenue Recognition for service dokuments 3M3
entry.content:
Hello dear proffessionals, 

we use the 3M3 for service Documents. The customer wants to change the correction account into the revenue account of origin, in order to have a better overview, when the posting is done after a run. 

So like....Revenue Account is 40000009 then for correction the system should take the same account to book the accruals against. 

Where can we maintain this change in the System? 

 

Thank you in advance. 

BR

Manuel

entry.title: Setting up Currency Exchange Rate API in Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hi,
I am setting up the Currency Exchange Rate API (Overview | Currency Exchange Rate | SAP Business Accelerator Hub) using the communication scenario SAP_COM_0B18 on an S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition system. I want to configure this service with an OAuth2.0 authentication (Authentication Code + PKCE). For testing I would have liked to create a GET request to the service URL using Postman. However I always get the error:

The requested OAuth 2.0 scope cannot be granted because it is either not assigned to the current user or to the OAuth 2.0 client. See SAP troubleshooting note 1688545.

I have checked the mentioned SAP troubleshooting note but this specific error is not mentioned there. When looking into the app "Display Connectivity Trace", the only information that i get is the following:


I have further checked that my business user has the correct role for the scope OV4:API_CURRENCYEXCHANGERATE (SAP_FIN_BC_CA_CURR_PC) according to the information in the Communication Arrangement:

This is the token request in Postman:

And the Callback URL is defined accordingly in the Communication System:

What am I missing?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: CAMT Import Error: Message About Old GVCs Despite New BTC Configuration (OT83)
entry.content:
Dear Community,
We have set up CAMT for a customer, including the new BTC codes. However, when the file is imported, the account statement is not posted because it displays a message stating that the old GVCs and the external transaction code UNALLOCATED are not maintained.

However, this cannot be the case because the new BTCs are maintained, as is the Unallocated code.
It also pulls the new transaction type. This is already stored in the bank accounts. This concerns the old GVCs 166 and 804.
The entire setup was done in transaction OT83.

Nevertheless, the following message appears:

Has anyone had this problem and knows what could be causing it?

Thank you.
Best Regards, 
Vanessa

#onprem #camt #gvc

entry.title: How to change bank account on the invoice form in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a problem with the bank account on the invoice output. The invoice output only shows one specific bank account, even if this account is deactivated in the Manage Bank Accounts app. I set up a different bank account number in the same app that I want to show on the invoice form, but the change didn't show up in the output.
Could you please clarify where exactly I can specify or activate the bank account to be used for the invoice? Alternatively, what settings are required for this?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Accout code which is posted by FAGL_FCV automatically
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to ask about Account code which is posted by FAGL_FCV automatically.

When I execute FAGL_FCV, SAP will automatically calculate valuation gain or loss and post using specific account code.

I want to change the specific account code which is automatically used by "Valuation area".

Do you know if it is possible?

entry.title: Planned delivery cost with variance account
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a case that I have a 35% tariff cost in a PO, and the actual tariff cost less than the PO cost, so supposed the difference will go to inventory account if there is enough stock. After I check the stock balance by MB5B, and there is enough stock here. But it still trigger our variance account in OBYC-PRD. Can anyone explain why? This condition type is revelevant to the inventory.

entry.title: reverse setelment of period 12/2025 in period2/2026
entry.content:
today 4.2.2026 my user discover that he had make a mistake when setelment process orders in 12/2025 and whant to reverse the setelement today with setelememt period and posting period 12/2025

how over ob52 period 12 is open , no locked period in opk1 i get error "invalid posting period" how to do what user need ?

thank you

entry.title: Customer invioce VAT 0,01 differnce coming
entry.content:
Hi ,

We have created upload program for uploading customer invoice(FB01) . However 50% invoices posted correctly but 50% invoices having VAT difference 0,01 . SAP calculating 23,60 but as per our books its only 23,59 .

how to solve it ?

Example  VAT 22%

 Account amount Tax 22%
DRCustomer 130,82 Q7
CRA GL 13,64 Q7
CRA GL 69,74 Q7
CRB GL 3,85 Q7
CRC GL 20 Q7
CRVAT 23,6differnce 0,01

entry.title: FX Diff/Gain Not Posting in Posting area 2 (Auto Clearing)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am experiencing an issue while setting up automatic bank statement clearing for a customer. We are using payment orders; however, the FX gain/loss is not posted automatically when the payment order is cleared automatically in Posting Area 2.

When I reprocess Posting Area 2 manually using the payment order, the FX gain/loss is posted correctly and works as expected.

What I want the system to post:

How does SAP perform the posting when both posting areas are processed automatically:

Thanks in advance,

Alice

entry.title: BTE 1820 causing dump when calling WLS Screening REST API
entry.content:
Hello ,

We have a requirement to block or allow payments during the F110 payment proposal run based on the response from the SAP Watch List Screening (WLS) REST API.

To achieve this, we implemented BTE 00001820, where we: Call the WLS REST API (send vendor + bank)  and Process the response to update the zlspr

Functionally, the logic works as expected when i debug the loop i get the items and each time the api runs and return the result . However, after finishing the loop , we consistently get the following runtime dump:

Runtime Error: DBSQL_INVALID_CURSOR

Exception: CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB

Short Text: Cursor already closed or not open yet

Program: SAPF110S

FORM: BSIK_SELEKTION_2

The dump only occurs when the REST API call is executed. If the REST call block is commented out, the dump no longer occurs. This suggests that calling the REST API inside BTE 1820 is interfering with open database cursors during the F110 processing.

Is there another BTE that is better suited for implementing this logic and setting the payment block (ZLSPR) based on screening results i did some search but could't find the suitable one ?

Alternatively, is there a safe way to keep this implementation in BTE 1820 without causing the DBSQL_INVALID_CURSOR dump?

Any guidance or  recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you
